values.name: awsTargetHeader
values.comment:
Adds necessary `X-Amz-Target` http request header

See <https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apigateway/api-reference/making-http-requests/>

values.name: signRequest
values.comment:
Given an unsigned request, this function returns a SignedRequest record to be passed to `Http.task`
<https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/elm/http/latest/Http#task>

    AWS.signRequest config now rawRequest
        |> Result.map Http.task

    -- Result String (Task x a)
values.type: AWS.Types.Config -> Time.Posix -> AWS.Types.UnsignedRequest x a -> Result.Result String.String (AWS.Types.SignedRequest x a)

name: AWS.DynamoDB

unions.name: Base64String
unions.comment: A wrapper to differentiate from regular String

aliases.name: QueryResponse
aliases.type: { count : Basics.Int, items : List.List a, lastEvaluatedKey : Json.Encode.Value }

values.name: decodeB
values.comment:
import Json.Decode

    toBase64 "aGVsbG8="
    |> Result.andThen (\v ->
        Json.Decode.decodeValue decodeB (encodeB v)
            |> Result.mapError Json.Decode.errorToString
    )
    --> toBase64 "aGVsbG8="

values.name: decodeBOOL
values.comment:
import Json.Decode

    Json.Decode.decodeValue decodeBOOL (encodeBOOL True)
    --> Ok True

values.name: decodeBS
values.comment:
import Json.Decode

    toBase64 "aGVsbG8="
    |> Result.andThen (\v ->
        Json.Decode.decodeValue decodeBS (encodeBS [v])
            |> Result.mapError Json.Decode.errorToString
    )
    --> Result.map (\v -> [v]) (toBase64 "aGVsbG8=")

values.name: decodeL
values.comment:
import Json.Decode

    toBase64 "aGVsbG8="
    |> Result.andThen (\v ->
        Json.Decode.decodeValue (decodeL decodeB) (encodeL encodeB [v])
            |> Result.mapError Json.Decode.errorToString
    )
    --> Result.map (\v -> [v]) (toBase64 "aGVsbG8=")

    Json.Decode.decodeValue (decodeL decodeN) (encodeL encodeN [3.14, 42])
    --> Ok [3.14, 42]

values.name: decodeM
values.comment:
import Json.Decode
    import Dict

    Json.Decode.decodeValue (decodeM decodeN) (encodeM encodeN (Dict.fromList [("hello", 3.14)]))
    --> Ok (Dict.fromList [("hello", 3.14)])

values.name: decodeN
values.comment:
import Json.Decode

    Json.Decode.decodeValue decodeN (encodeN 3.14)
    --> Ok 3.14

values.name: decodeNS
values.comment:
import Json.Decode
    import Set

    Json.Decode.decodeValue decodeNS (encodeNS (Set.fromList [1, 3, 5, 7]))
    --> Ok (Set.fromList [1, 3, 5, 7])

values.name: decodeNULL
values.comment:
import Json.Decode

    Json.Decode.decodeValue decodeNULL (encodeNULL False)
    --> Ok False

values.name: decodeS
values.comment:
import Json.Decode

    Json.Decode.decodeValue decodeS (encodeS "Hello")
    --> Ok "Hello"

values.name: decodeSS
values.comment:
import Json.Decode
    import Set

    Json.Decode.decodeValue decodeSS (encodeSS (Set.fromList ["hello", "world"]))
    --> Ok (Set.fromList ["hello", "world"])

values.name: encodeB
values.comment:
import Json.Encode

    toBase64 "aGVsbG8="
    |> Result.map (\v -> Json.Encode.encode 0 (encodeB v))
    --> Ok """{"B":"aGVsbG8="}"""

values.name: encodeBOOL
values.comment:
import Json.Encode

    Json.Encode.encode 0 (encodeBOOL False)
    --> """{"BOOL":false}"""

values.name: encodeBS
values.comment:
import Json.Encode

    toBase64 "aGVsbG8="
    |> Result.map (\v -> Json.Encode.encode 0 (encodeBS ([v])))
    --> Ok """{"BS":["aGVsbG8="]}"""

values.name: encodeL
values.comment:
import Json.Encode

    Json.Encode.encode 0 (encodeL encodeN [1,3,5,7])
    --> """{"L":[{"N":"1"},{"N":"3"},{"N":"5"},{"N":"7"}]}"""

values.name: encodeM
values.comment:
import Json.Encode
    import Dict

    Json.Encode.encode 0 (encodeM encodeN (Dict.fromList [("width", 800), ("height", 600)]))
    --> """{"M":{"height":{"N":"600"},"width":{"N":"800"}}}"""

values.name: encodeN
values.comment:
import Json.Encode

    Json.Encode.encode 0 (encodeN 3.14)
    --> """{"N":"3.14"}"""

values.name: encodeNS
values.comment:
import Json.Encode
    import Set

    Json.Encode.encode 0 (encodeNS (Set.fromList [1,3,5,7]))
    --> """{"NS":["1","3","5","7"]}"""

values.name: encodeNULL
values.comment:
import Json.Encode

    Json.Encode.encode 0 (encodeNULL True)
    --> """{"NULL":true}"""

values.name: encodeS
values.comment:
import Json.Encode

    Json.Encode.encode 0 (encodeS "Hello")
    --> """{"S":"Hello"}"""

values.name: encodeSS
values.comment:
import Json.Encode
    import Set

    Json.Encode.encode 0 (encodeSS (Set.fromList ["hello", "world"]))
    --> """{"SS":["hello","world"]}"""

values.name: fromBase64
values.comment:
Obtain the regular `String` content. Decode it yourself, e.g.
<https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/waratuman/elm-coder/3.0.1/Base64#decode>

aliases.name: Config
aliases.type: { awsSecretAccessKey : String.String, awsRegion : String.String, accessKeyId : String.String, service : AWS.Types.Service }

aliases.name: Signature
aliases.type: { text : String.String, credentialScope : String.String, headers : List.List ( String.String, String.String ), signedHeaders : String.String, algorithm : String.String }

aliases.name: SignedRequest
aliases.type: { method : String.String, headers : List.List Http.Header, url : String.String, body : Http.Body, resolver : Http.Resolver x a, timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float }

aliases.name: UnsignedRequest
aliases.type: { method : String.String, headers : List.List ( String.String, String.String ), query : List.List ( String.String, String.String ), stringBody : String.String, resolver : Http.Resolver x a, timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float }
